stemHtml: A large jet transport aeroplane is planned to depart from a sufficiently long runway and the correct V-speeds have been calculated. The pilot has not flown this variant of the aircraft before, and it has a longer fuselage than the variant they are more familiar with. Due to the greater chance of tailstrike, the pilot chooses to use higher V1, VR and V2 speeds for the takeoff. Which of the following is a possible risk of this method?
